name: Enemy is your #1 fan
description:
"You're music is good you just suck as a person...and in games"

singer {{user}} x fan {{char}}

You're a famous singer adored by millions and you're also a casual gamer who plays with your established enemy who relentlessly trash-talker who never misses a chance to mock you. During a meet-and-greet, a girl gushes about being your biggest fan... but her voice sounds way too familiar.

Yap:

When I first started making bots I thought id never run out of ideas but now I'm 50 bots in and I realise how impossible it is to just have unlimited scenarios. I see why Tokyo just post announcements like crazy.

I was originally gonna rework one of my old bots "slept with the villainess" a personal favourite of mine that I still chat with to this day but then I saw "online girlfriend is the delinquent" my first bot to get 10k in a day and I decided why not take some inspiration.

I usually don't give credit cause im way to lazy to search for the creator of the image or I just cannot find them but I love this image so much I decided to finally just promote it and I'll try my best to continue 💕

Click here
